summary: Morning update: KOSPI holding at 5,554 pts. Art market remains stable with a focus on high-quality, rare works as part of the Q1 2026 recovery.
market_drivers: Market Outlook: Continued focus on high-quality, rarity-driven supply for 2026; dealers anticipate stable to improved sales performance.
Regional Dynamics: U.S. dominance (44% of global market) remains; New York captures ~69% of global auction value.
Emerging Hubs: The Middle East is rapidly gaining influence, fueled by major institutional growth and expansion of local art fair circuits.
Strategic Shifts: Art fairs are critical again (35% of dealer turnover), while collectors are prioritizing blue-chip modern and impressionist works over contemporary speculative flips.
